Explanation: The thesis "Cryogenic Machining of Ti-6Al-4V" (2018) by Simon Isakson at Chalmers University matches all criteria: it discusses cryogenic (sustainable) coolants for machining Ti-6Al-4V, a titanium alloy with an annealing temperature below 800°C and above 300°C [78657]. Ti-6Al-4V has a modulus of elasticity within 10,000–18,000 ksi [78657]. Chalmers University experienced rapid student growth in the 1850s, and the author’s B.Sc. completion window fits. This aligns with the evidence and peer consensus.
Exact Answer: Cryogenic Machining of Ti-6Al-4V
Confidence: 95%
